subject: [SWFL] Capital Partners, a Minnesota-based commer…

top_story.title: Capital Partners, a Minnesota-based commercial real estate firm, bought the Meridian Business Center on Parallel Drive (near Interstate Commerce Drive and Interstate 75) in Fort Myers, using $30.5 million in acquisition financing — a 10-year fixed-rate loan at 5.5% with partial interest-only terms, structured by CBRE Capital Markets.

signals_surfaced: Capital Partners, a Minnesota-based commercial real estate firm, bought the Meridian Business Center on Parallel Drive (near Interstate Commerce Drive and Interstate 75) in Fort Myers, using $30.5 million in acquisition financing — a 10-year fixed-rate loan at 5.5% with partial interest-only terms, structured by CBRE Capital Markets.
A unit at 5200 Seagrass Way 403, Bonita Springs, FL 34134 (The Ritz-Carlton Residences, Estero Bay) is listed at $4,125,000 — MLS #226019891, 3 beds, 4 baths, 3,610 sqft.
5200 Seagrass Way #403, Bonita Springs, FL listed for sale at $4,125,000; 3 beds, 4 baths, 3,610 sq ft.

Capital Partners, a Minnesota-based commercial real estate firm, bought the Meridian Business Center on Parallel Drive (near Interstate 75 and Interstate Commerce Drive, Fort Myers area), using $30.5 million in acquisition financing — a 10-year fixed-rate loan at 5.5% with partial interest — structured by CBRE Capital Markets.
